caption: A man with a shaved head and a dark beard is recorded in a studio setting against a dark gray, ribbed acoustic foam wall. He wears a white t-shirt and large black over-ear headphones. A professional silver microphone is positioned in front of him, held by a boom arm that features the white text "RØDECaster Pro II". The man has tattoos on his right arm, which is partially visible. Throughout the sequence, he is speaking into the microphone, his expression shifting from an open-mouthed, surprised look to a more closed, contemplative expression. His head tilts slightly, and his facial muscles move as he talks, while the camera remains stationary, capturing him from the chest up in a close-up shot.
